joker_main.description: Fires once per Joker during the main scoring evaluation. The classic return point for flat `mult`, `chips`, `x_mult`, `dollars` payouts.

main_scoring.summary: Scoring pass for played cards / enhancements / seals / editions.
main_scoring.description: Active while a card, enhancement, seal, or edition is being scored as part of the played hand. Use this for per-card effects rather than per-joker effects.

individual.description: Fires once for each scored card; `context.other_card` is the card being scored. Use `context.cardarea == G.play` for cards in the hand vs. `G.jokers` for Jokers.
individual.example:
if context.individual and context.cardarea == G.play and not context.blueprint then
    -- inspect context.other_card
end

repetition.description: Return `{ repetitions = N }` to retrigger the current card N additional times.

before.description: Before any scoring runs for the played hand. Good for level-ups, setup effects, or previewing the hand.
before.example: if context.before and not context.blueprint then end

after.description: Runs once after all scoring has finished for the hand, before the hand is discarded.
after.example: if context.after and not context.blueprint then end

end_of_round.description: Fires at the end of the round (after a blind is beaten), commonly paired with `context.main_eval` to avoid duplicate triggers.
end_of_round.example: if context.end_of_round and context.main_eval and not context.blueprint then end

main_eval.summary: Marker on the primary evaluation pass.
main_eval.description: Set to true during the top-level calculation pass; use it to deduplicate effects that SMODS would otherwise evaluate multiple times.

blueprint.summary: Copy evaluation from a Blueprint/Brainstorm joker.
blueprint.description: Truthy when the current evaluation is a copy triggered by Blueprint or Brainstorm. Gate effects that shouldn't be copied with `not context.blueprint`.

blueprint_card.description: The copying Joker (Blueprint/Brainstorm) when `context.blueprint` is set.

other_card.summary: The other card involved in the current evaluation.
other_card.description: In `individual`/`repetition`/`post_trigger` contexts, the currently-evaluated playing card. In other contexts, a related card provided by the caller.

other_joker.summary: The Joker whose calculation triggered this one.
other_joker.description: Typically set in Blueprint-like chains and retrigger passes.

cardarea.description: One of `G.play` (played hand), `G.hand`, `G.jokers`, or `'unscored'`. Use to filter `individual` callbacks to specific zones.

scoring_hand.summary: Cards that count as scoring for this hand.
scoring_hand.description: Array of card objects that are part of the scoring hand (after discards).

full_hand.summary: All cards in the played hand.
full_hand.description: Array including both scoring and non-scoring played cards.

poker_hands.summary: Poker hand table for the played hand.
poker_hands.description: Map of `hand_name -> cards[]` describing which poker-hand categories the played hand satisfies.

scoring_name.summary: Canonical name of the scoring poker hand.

playing_card_added.summary: New playing card added to the deck.
playing_card_added.description: Set when cards are appended to `G.playing_cards`. Inspect `context.cards` for the list.

hand_drawn.summary: Cards have just been drawn to the hand.
hand_drawn.description: Fires once per draw step. `context.cards` contains the drawn cards.

using_consumeable.summary: A consumable card is being used.
using_consumeable.description: Return `{ message = ... }` or mutate state. `context.consumeable` is the used card.

buying_card.summary: A card is about to be purchased.

selling_card.description: `context.card` is the card being sold. Fires before the sell resolves, so field mutations still apply.

selling_self.description: Use when a Joker wants to emit a final effect as it leaves play.

destroying_card.summary: A card is about to be destroyed.
destroying_card.description: Return a truthy value to confirm the destruction, `false`/`nil` to spare it.

remove_playing_cards.summary: Playing cards being removed from the deck.
remove_playing_cards.description: `context.removed` is the array of removed cards.

setting_blind.summary: Blind selected, about to start the round.

reroll_shop.description: No payload; just a signal to react (e.g., discount tags).

first_hand_drawn.summary: The very first hand of the round.
first_hand_drawn.description: Fires immediately after the opening hand is drawn.

debuffed_playing_card.summary: A playing card has been debuffed.

setting_ability.description: Fires while a card's `ability` table is being initialized.

modify_probability.description: Use to multiply or override probability numerators/denominators. Return `{ numerator, denominator }`.

fix_probability.summary: Locks in the probability for this roll.
fix_probability.description: Use to clamp a chance to always succeed or always fail for this evaluation.

check_enhancement.description: Short-lived; gate stateful side effects behind `not context.check_enhancement`.

extra_enhancement.description: Set while an extra enhancement is being evaluated — avoid feedback loops by gating with `not context.extra_enhancement`.

retrigger_joker.summary: This evaluation is a retrigger copy.
retrigger_joker.description: Truthy when re-running a Joker from a retrigger effect.

post_trigger.description: Fires after another Joker's effect resolves so jokers can react to each other.

forcetrigger.description: Used by a handful of SMODS internals to bypass normal eligibility checks.

debuff_card.description: Return `true` to debuff `context.card`. Use in `Mod.set_debuff` or on objects exposing it.

beat_boss.description: Set after the final scoring of a boss round resolves.

game_over.description: Return `{ saved = true }` from a Joker to prevent the loss (e.g., Mr. Bones).

pre_discard.description: Hook to mutate the cards before they leave the hand.

creating_shop_card.description: Modify or veto the card being added to the shop; inspect `context.card`.
